/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gui_sim.dir/gui_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui_sim.dir/Users/aksharbezgoan/Documents/Computing/ORION/orion_ws/src/kinematics_solver/src/forward_kinematics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui_sim.dir/Users/aksharbezgoan/Documents/Computing/ORION/orion_ws/src/kinematics_solver/src/robot_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui_sim.dir/Users/aksharbezgoan/Documents/Computing/ORION/orion_ws/src/kinematics_solver/src/inverse_kinematics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui_sim.dir/Users/aksharbezgoan/Documents/Computing/ORION/orion_ws/src/kinematics_solver/src/trajectory_optimiser.cpp.o -o gui_sim  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
